# Feature Request

Thank you for suggesting an improvement for Internet Scanner!

## Feature Description

Describe the feature you would like to see added.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem would this feature solve?

Why would it make Internet Scanner better?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature could work.

## Possible Alternatives

Are there any alternative solutions or approaches?

## Additional Information

Add screenshots, examples, or other details if useful.
